title: SubscriptionRevoked
description: Event emitted when an active subscription is revoked, either manually by an IAM principal or automatically by the system (e.g., policy violation, compensation after a failed provisioning step).

subscription_id.description: Unique identifier of the subscription being revoked (UUID format).

product_id.description: Composite key identifying the data product: domain#product_name.

consumer_account_id.description: AWS account ID of the consumer whose access is being revoked.

revoked_by.description: IAM principal ARN that triggered the revocation, or 'system' for automatic compensation revokes.

revoked_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the revocation was processed.

reason.description: Human-readable reason for revocation (e.g., 'Policy violation', 'Compensation: LF grant failed').

compensation_reason.description: Machine-readable reason set by the saga compensator when auto-revoking after a failed provisioning step.
